title: @invalidate(self) builtin — signals struct is intentionally leaving valid state
description: Add @invalidate(self) as a compiler builtin available inside *Self methods on structs with invariant declarations. Sets the hidden __valid field to false. After this call, the post-method invariant check is skipped. Stripped entirely in release mode. Linter warns when a deinit method on a struct with invariants omits @invalidate.
close_reason: superseded: deinit exemption approach (spec updated in 8rf.4) requires no @invalidate builtin or __valid field. deinit methods are simply not invariant-checked.
